overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a dirt trail through a lush post-apocalyptic wilderness. The environment features red vegetation, rocky cliffs, a winding river, and dense forests under a partly cloudy sky. A holographic waypoint marker appears in the latter portion of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside wilderness trail with rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking steadily along the dirt trail, heading toward the rocky cliffs in the distance while keeping the river to her left

entered.detail: Large reddish-brown rock formation rising above the tree line with layered sedimentary texture
Winding waterway with visible current and rocky banks running parallel to the trail
Sandy-brown footpath with scattered stones winding through the wilderness
Patches of distinctive red and pink low-lying plants covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit wilderness trail with the character walking along a dirt path. A river flows parallel on the left while rocky cliffs rise in the distance ahead. The landscape is dotted with trees and distinctive red vegetation under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with large boulders

events.description: path curves left around a large rock outcropping, revealing more dense forest ahead

agents.ego_description: Aloy continues walking along the winding trail, navigating around large boulders and dense vegetation patches

entered.detail: Massive moss-covered rock formation beside the trail
Thick cluster of tall trees creating a dark green canopy on the horizon
Cluster of tall purple flowering plants growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail curves through a rockier section of the wilderness, with large boulders appearing on the left and dense forest visible ahead. The river falls back into the distance while patches of purple wildflowers and red ferns line the path. The terrain becomes more rugged as the character approaches a bend.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with holographic game interface element

events.description: holographic waypoint marker labeled 'Plainsong' appears projected on a rock face, indicating a game objective location
character passes the holographic marker and continues along the winding trail

agents.ego_description: Aloy approaches and passes a glowing blue holographic waypoint marker while continuing along the forest trail

entered.detail: Glowing blue translucent game interface marker with the text 'Plainsong' projected onto a rock surface
Opening in the tree line revealing distant mountains and more trail ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character rounds the bend, a holographic waypoint marker labeled 'Plainsong' appears projected on a rock face to the right, indicating a game objective. The trail continues through a more forested area with denser tree cover overhead. After passing the marker, the path opens into a clearing with distant mountains visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wilderness trail that transitions from an open river valley into a dense, rugged forest clearing. It begins on a sunlit dirt path where a river flows parallel to the left beneath a partly cloudy sky and distant rocky cliffs. As the character advances, the trail curves through a rockier terrain where the river recedes and the landscape shifts toward large boulders and patches of purple wildflowers and red ferns. The scene then tightens as the character rounds a bend and passes a holographic waypoint marker labeled Plainsong projected on a rock face, moving under the cover of a denser forest canopy. Finally, the path opens once more into a wide clearing that reveals distant mountains on the horizon.
